raw_title: What the DSA Means Outside Europe: Research Access and Its Limits
title_en: What the DSA Means Outside Europe: Research Access and Its Limits
title_zh: 《数字服务法》在欧洲之外的意义：研究可及性及其限制
plain_summary_zh: 本文探讨欧盟《数字服务法》（DSA）对欧洲以外地区研究人员获取平台数据的影响，分析DSA在促进研究可及性方面的作用及其局限性。
plain_summary_en: This article examines the impact of the EU's Digital Services Act (DSA) on researchers' access to platform data outside Europe, analyzing the DSA's role in facilitating research access and its limitations.
research_direction_zh: 数字平台监管与数据可及性研究
research_direction_en: Digital platform regulation and data accessibility research
